\documentclass[10pt,letterpaper]{article}

% Fonts and encoding - simplified for pdflatex compatibility
\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\usepackage{lmodern}

% Geometry - Harvard style uses 0.5in margins
\usepackage[margin=0.5in]{geometry}

% Colors
\usepackage{xcolor}
\definecolor{darkblue}{rgb}{0.1,0.1,0.3}

% Typography and links
\usepackage{titlesec}
\usepackage{enumitem}
\usepackage{hyperref}

% No page numbers
\pagestyle{empty}

% Remove paragraph indentation
\setlength{\parindent}{0pt}
\setlength{\parskip}{0pt}

% Section formatting - compact and professional
\titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{6pt}{3pt}
\titlespacing*{\subsection}{0pt}{4pt}{2pt}
\titleformat{\section}
  {\normalfont\bfseries\large\color{darkblue}}
  {}
  {0pt}
  {}
  [\vspace{-8pt}\hrule\vspace{3pt}]

\titleformat{\subsection}
  {\normalfont\bfseries\normalsize}
  {}
  {0pt}
  {}

% List formatting - compact
\setlist[itemize]{
  leftmargin=15pt,
  itemsep=1pt,
  parsep=0pt,
  topsep=2pt,
  partopsep=0pt
}

% Adjust line spacing for tighter layout
\renewcommand{\baselinestretch}{0.95}

\begin{document}

$body$

\end{document}
